---
name: New skill proposal
about: Sketch a skill you think belongs in this collection
title: "proposal: <skill-name>"
labels: proposal
---

## The repeated task this would capture

What do you keep doing by hand (or keep re-explaining to Claude) that a
skill should encode?

## Trigger phrases

What would someone say that should invoke it? ("run the X", "check the
Y", ...)

## Rough workflow

Numbered steps, as best you can sketch them. Rough is fine.

## Willing to build it?

Yes / no / with help.
